text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From today, I'll be training Mejiro Bright, an
easygoing, free-spirited member of the Mejiro
family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may be slow to start and accelerate, but
something about her shines through in the final
stretch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her leisurely manner, she's determined to
one day become the new light of the
Mejiros—and I'm itching to see where that goal
will take her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to watch over her through her
participation in the Twinkle Series.
